failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 159 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time Application log bucketed into 10-minute windows, counting ERROR lines per bucket. ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 ..."

artifact.source:
ERROR rate over time

This chart reads the application log at logs/app.log, which spans one hour of traffic from 09:00 to 10:00. Each ERROR line is grouped into a ten-minute bucket based on its timestamp, and the chart below plots how many ERROR lines fall into each bucket, from 09:00 through 09:50.

Of the 22 ERROR lines in the log, the busiest bucket is 09:30 with 11 errors, more than half the total. Volume ramps up starting at 09:10, peaks at 09:30, and tapers off by 09:50.
